results.title: The EU Pay Transparency Directive: What it is, what it requires, and why it matters
results.description: As of 7 June 2026, EU member states will be required to have the Pay Transparency Directive in national law. From publishing salary ranges in job ads to mandatory gender pay gap reporting, here is a full breakdown of what employers are now expected to do.

results.title: Ukrainian forces hit Russian patrol ship and Pantsir missile system in temporarily occupied Crimea – video
results.description: Units of Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces struck a Russian Svetlyachok-class border patrol ship in temporarily occupied Crimea on the night of 3-4 June.

results.title: Fireweed kicks off 2026 Yukon fieldwork
results.description: Macpass drilling starts as Mactung feasibility studies advance. Fireweed Metals Corp. June 4 announced the start of its 2026 field program across both the Macpass zinc-lead-silver and Mactung tungsten projects in eastern Yukon, with roughly 9,500 meters of drilling planned alongside feasibility work and regional infrastructure planning. results.title: Rabbinical court to sanction alienating parents
results.description: New protocol for rabbinical courts requires urgent handling of cases involving children’s safety and parental alienation, including rapid hearings, court oversight, and sanctions against alienating parents.

results.title: Suckled calf trade described as 'a real flyer' at Hereford Market
results.description: Bull calves reached a top price of £2,240 at Hereford Market's suckled calf sale on May 26.

results.title: Tire giant Pirelli vows legal action as short seller alleges ‘close relationship’ with Russia
results.description: Pirelli has instructed lawyers to take legal action after short seller Grizzly Research claimed the firm has a "close relationship" with Russia.

results.title: See the latest depot and retail prices for cooking gas nationwide
results.description: Cooking gas prices in Nigeria approach N1,400/kg as global instability persists. Experts warn of further hikes amid rising costs of living and geopolitical tensions.

results.title: WhatsApp iOS update brings cleaner chat filters, new Drafts category
results.description: WhatsApp is updating the Chats tab on iPhone with more customisation options, helping users better organise conversations and revisit unsent messages.

results.title: Trump 'looks like he's going to pass out' during surprise Oval Office return after lengthy absence
results.description: Donald Trump made a public appearance at the Oval Office on Wednesday after a nearly seven-day absence, seemingly concealing a bruised hand as social media users raised alarming health concerns

results.title: Bomb scare at Gurugram municipal corporation headquarters, mayor's office, search ops underway
results.description: The Gurugram municipal corporation headquarters and the mayor's office in Sector 34 received a bomb threat on Thursday, police said. Soon after receiving information about the bomb threat, police started a search operation as the authorities are sweeping the premises for suspicious objects or explosives. The threat email brought police and security agencies on their toes, with personnel, dog squad, and bomb disposal units rushing to the civic body's Sector 34 office.

results.title: Plot to smuggle Queensland fugitive bikie to Indonesia foiled

results.title: 'Bring Sticks, Turn India Into Nepal': Meet 3 Gen Z Leaders of Cockroach Janata Party over June 6 Protest Slogan
results.description: The Cockroach Janata Party (CJP), founded by Abhijeet Dipke, has announced three spokespersons—Saurav Das, Vijeta Dahiya, and Ashutosh Ranka—ahead of its June 6 protest at Jantar Mantar demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over examination-related controversies.
